dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires 20-bar directional move with low volatility (smooth diffusion). Approximated using: (1) close above/below sma_20 for direction confirmation, (2) atr_14 < 0.5% of price (expressed as 0.005 decimal), (3) returns magnitude > 2 ATR as proxy for established momentum. The '20 bars in trend' requirement is market-regime dependent and monitored separately. Exit on MA crossover confirms trend reversal.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires 20-bar directional move with low volatility (smooth diffusion). Approximated using: (1) close above/below sma_20 for direction confirmation, (2) atr_14 < 0.5% of price (expressed as 0.005 decimal), (3) returns magnitude > 2 ATR as proxy for established momentum. The '20 bars in trend' requirement is market-regime dependent and monitored separately. Exit on MA crossover confirms trend reversal.

source_rule_text: A trader should enter trend-following positions when prices are changing gradually enough to establish momentum, as this gradual diffusion of information creates predictable price trends that momentum traders can exploit.
